falsification_conditions.condition: Price increases by 10% above current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant upward move would contradict the 'HOLD' signal and suggest a bullish trend, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 14-day average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate strong market participation, refuting the 'HOLD' and suggesting a breakout or reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score decreases below 25 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A drop in blowoff score would indicate reduced pressure, contradicting the current pattern's implication of continued bearish momentum.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
